explanation: The code defines a program that asks the user to enter a word. It uses a recursive function called `betweenletters` to read each character inputted by the user. If the character is a newline, the function terminates; if the character is not a lowercase letter, it prints an error message and exits. If a valid character is entered, it recursively calls itself to continue reading the next characters and prints each valid character until a newline is detected.
name: 2006-04-24_fgd-gmail-com
summary: This project prompts the user to enter a word and then prints each letter of that word, validating that only lowercase letters are accepted.
